Event:
Event Date:
Sage Bot Item Code: E22
The Power of Lightning

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, fires chain lightning at a random enemy. Lightning bolt deals 23500 / 33600 / 48000 / 64000 / 80000 / 100000 / 130000 magic damage and bounces to 2 enemies.

Enhancement: 2
13000 Spell power from the gems
Once in a while, fires chain lightning at a random enemy. Lightning bolt deals 35300 / 50400 / 72000 / 96000 / 120000 / 150000 / 195000 magic damage and bounces to 3 enemies. Lightning also electrifies affected enemies for 3 sec. Whenever an electrified unit uses an ability, they are stunned for 1 sec.

Enhancement: 3
27000 Spell power from the gems
Once in a while, fires chain lightning at a random enemy. Lightning bolt deals 47000 / 67200 / 96000 / 128000 / 160000 / 200000 / 260000 magic damage and bounces to 4 enemies. Lightning also electrifies affected enemies for 3 sec. Whenever an electrified unit uses an ability, they are stunned for 1 sec.
